recommendations.title: A Twelve-Year Night
recommendations.overview: Uruguay, 1973. Having been crushed by the military dictatorship, surviving members of the Tupamaro guerillas are imprisoned and tortured. They must find a way to endure the coming 12 years.

recommendations.title: The Endless Trench
recommendations.overview: A small village in Huelva, Andalusia, Spain, 1936. Higinio and Rosa have been married only for a few months when the Civil War breaks out. Higinio, being afraid of possible reprisals from the rebel faction, decides to use a hole dug in his own house
recommendations.director: Jon Garaño, Aitor Arregi, Jose Mari Goenaga

recommendations.title: The Teacher Who Promised the Sea
recommendations.overview: The buried memories of the Spanish Civil War are unearthed as a woman searches for the remains of her grandfather's father and discovers the story of an idealistic young teacher from Tarragona.

recommendations.title: 1898: Our Last Men in the Philippines
recommendations.overview: The Philippines, 1898. Fifty Spanish soldiers arrive in the small village of Baler to rebuild an outpost. Although the war against the Filipinos and their American allies is almost lost, as is the Spanish Empire, the garrison will endure a cruel sieg

recommendations.title: The Pit and the Pendulum
recommendations.overview: In the sixteenth century, Francis Barnard travels to Spain to clarify the strange circumstances of his sister's death after she had married the son of a cruel Spanish Inquisitor.

recommendations.title: April 9th
recommendations.overview: In the early morning of April 9, 1940, the Danish army is alerted: the Germans have crossed the border.

recommendations.title: The Girl of Your Dreams
recommendations.overview: A company of Spanish movie makers leaves Franco's Spain and moves to Hitler's Germany to make a film in co-production. Soon some problems start to arise...

recommendations.title: While at War
recommendations.overview: Salamanca, Spain, 1936. In the early days of the military rebellion that began the Spanish Civil War (1936-39), writer Miguel de Unamuno supports the uprising in the hope that the prevailing political chaos will end. But when the confrontation become

recommendations.title: Land and Freedom
recommendations.overview: David Carr is a British Communist who is unemployed. In 1936, when the Spanish Civil War begins, he decides to fight for the Republican side, a coalition of liberals, communists and anarchists, so he joins the POUM militia and witnesses firsthand the

recommendations.title: The Spirit of the Beehive
recommendations.overview: In 1940, in the immediate aftermath of the Spanish Civil War, a young girl living on the Castilian plain is haunted after attending a screening of James Whale's 1931 film Frankenstein and hearing from her sister that the monster is not dead, instead
